sections.paragraph:
prop. “capital city,” Syr. ܪܰܒܬܐܳ, hence [Rabbah, Rabbath], pr.n.-

(1) of the capital city of the Ammonites, 2Sa 11:1 12:27 Jos 13:25 1Ch 20:1 Jerem. 49:3 (not Psa 110:6); fully רַבַּת בְּנֵי עַמֹּון Deu 3:11 Gr. Phlia delphia, in Abulfeda, and also at present عَمَّانُ (Tab. Syriæ, p. 91), compare as to its ruins, Seetzen in v. Zach’s Monatl. Correspond., xviii, p. 429; and Burckhardt, Travels in Syria, p. 612-618; compare p. 1062, Germ. ed.

(2) of a town in the tribe of Judah, Jos 15:60.
